results.title: Solidgate Complaints Policy | Fair and Timely Resolution
results.content: Solid Processing Ltd (Solidgate) is a registered company in the Republic of Cyprus (HE429757) and is an authorized Electronic Money Institution by the Central Bank of Cyprus with license number 115.1.3.58. This Complaints policy is applicable to all services provided by Solidgate and it is an integral part of the Terms and Conditions. Solidgate is striving to manage all complaints in a timely, fair and transparent manner. The aim of this policy is to provide a process for managing complaints in a timely, systematic and transparent way using a specified timeframe in a way to refine and improve the quality of services provided to our customers. In case you are dissatisfied with our final response, you may be able to refer the matter to the Financial Ombudsman Office in the Republic of Cyprus or through an Alternative Dispute Resolution channel or the Central Bank of Cyprus.

results.title: SolonGate | Security Gateway for AI Tools
results.content: # #1 Security Gateway for AI Execution. Infrastructure-level security for autonomous agents. Built for air-gapped and mission-critical environments. Workup by Türkiye İş Bankası · SolonGate Design PartnerMercatus Center · SolonGate Design PartnerFCS Tekno · SolonGate Design PartnerHAVELSAN JetCube · SolonGate Design PartnerEra Envision · SolonGate Design Partner. Enterprise-grade audit trails for every AI tool call.Join the design partner program. ## How SolonGate intercepts AI tool calls. SolonGate reads the real tool-call payload and denies anything your policy forbids, in milliseconds. ### Every call, audited in real time. Allow or deny, with the rule and the arguments, streamed to a tamper-evident log. SolonGateSolonGate Audit Log · live streaming. ### See how the pipeline works. From interception to decision to tamper-evident audit, in one deterministic pass. ## Architecture & Security. ## Secure AI agents at the execution layer. Deploy SolonGate as a zero-trust proxy in front of your MCP servers, air-gapped or on-premise, with full audit logging of every tool call.
